alt: Aquality Farms mushroom grow kits: Blue Oyster, Italian Oyster, and Black Pearl
caption: Blue Oyster, Italian Oyster, Black Pearl. Boxed and ready to grow at home.

alt: Aquality Farms products: butter lettuce, microgreens, oyster mushrooms, and mushroom tincture bottles
caption: What comes out of the warehouse: lettuce, microgreens, oyster mushrooms, and their own line of tinctures.

alt: Aquality Farms tincture line — Revive, Relax, Recover, and Restore — with ultrasonic extraction equipment in the background
caption: The tincture line: Lion's Mane, Reishi, Turkey Tail, Shiitake. Made in-house with the extraction rig behind them.

alt: Aquality Farms Harvest Box with Golden Oyster mushrooms, butter lettuce, microgreens, sweet potatoes, and other local farm products
caption: The Harvest Box: Golden Oyster mushrooms, lettuce, microgreens, and produce from other local farms. One box, multiple growers.

alt: Samuel and John Mark Sawyer at the Aquality Farms booth with their mushroom grow kits and products
caption: Samuel and John Mark at a market booth with their products. Two brothers, one mission.
